actionUnits.condition: XR Interaction Toolkit interactable: m_Activated PersistentCalls configured on PrefabInstance(763022183). On Activate, it invokes LaunchProjectile.Fire (MonoBehaviour id 763022186; guid 623c5848030e9674893bb3bb376834b8) and PlayQuickSound.Play (MonoBehaviour id 763022189; guid 0755a2ba17a31d643b4a27e3034d8a79). Fire will Instantiate projectilePrefab (Projectile_Dart guid 4974b2795b7628f4c878a49beb275e6f; fileID 9093831001618171185) at startPoint (Transform id 1907306203) and attempt to AddForce via Rigidbody if present. Sound asset guid 8436c8cf5779f4fbda9ea5a4acee8d73 will play.

XRGrabInteractable (MonoBehaviour id 763022187; guid 0ad34abafad169848a38072baa96cdb2) has m_Activated PersistentCalls configured to invoke LaunchProjectile.Fire (MonoBehaviour id 763022186; guid 623c5848030e9674893bb3bb376834b8) and PlayQuickSound.Play (MonoBehaviour id 763022189; guid 0755a2ba17a31d643b4a27e3034d8a79). LaunchProjectile is configured with projectilePrefab=Projectile_Dart (fileID 9093831001618171185; guid 4974b2795b7628f4c878a49beb275e6f) and startPoint=fileID 1907306203, launchSpeed=5. Note: Projectile_Dart prefab has no Rigidbody, so AddForce branch will be skipped; this Trigger validates Instantiate and sound playback.

Speaker_Modern PrefabInstance(1734837738) has PlaySoundsFromList (MonoBehaviour id 1734837741; guid 76a895b5e674db04d8b4f8110c068852) with shouldLoop=true and 3 audio clips configured. No PersistentCalls (m_Calls) are wired to control audio, and the object lacks Rigidbody/Collider. To cover public no-arg methods, we trigger them using a Rigidbody source (Lighter id 1940743904, Tag=Player) per constraints.

Light_Switch is a PrefabInstance (fileID 1768355677) under --INTERACTABLE--. It has an XR Interaction Toolkit interactable MonoBehaviour (id 1768355684; script guid 8a35f6cfbfba9b548aaa00d52cfe8a50). Scene meta shows UnityEvent m_Calls: HoverEntered -> GameObject(377328966).SetActive(true); HoverExited -> GameObject(377328966).SetActive(false); SelectEntered -> ToggleOnOff.Toggle on components 1887208566 and 2061883187, plus GameObject(377328966).SetActive(false). Since the object lacks Rigidbody/Colliders (m_Colliders=[]; Has_Rigidbody=false), hover/select won't occur naturally. We manually invoke the SelectEntered receivers (no-arg methods) to ensure coverage of configured m_Calls. To also cover the SetActive calls on HoverEntered/HoverExited and SelectEntered, we need a no-arg wrapper MonoBehaviour or permission to call GameObject.SetActive with a bool parameter.

No manual event method calls are added here to avoid redundancy.
